details.test: Task 1: Register 7-year-old for earliest Beginner 1 kids swim class
Task 2: Reserve cheapest indoor lap lane tomorrow 6–7 AM under $15
Task 3: Purchase 1-month family membership with latest closing time under $120
Task 4: Reserve Saturday birthday party for 15 kids with room & pizza under $350
Task 5: Add three evening open swim sessions next week to My Schedule
Task 6: Buy 5 digital guest passes with lowest total price under $60
Task 7: Enroll in weekend lifeguard certification course under $300 with CPR before June 30
Task 8: Register for two different evening aqua fitness classes on different days under $20 each
